NotFound.description: The greenhouse, zone, or actuator does not exist.

ValidationFailed.description: A value is out of range or violates a setpoint/threshold invariant; the body names the violated bound.

Unauthorized.description: The write endpoint requires authentication (the controller config set `[rest].auth_token`) and the request carried no matching `Authorization: Bearer` credential (RFC-011). Only returned when the optional token is enabled; otherwise writes are unauthenticated.
